description_long: This is a freestanding retail snack display kiosk, featuring four horizontal shelves stocked with assorted bags of Lay's and Doritos chips. The structure is primarily constructed from metal with a perforated back panel and sturdy side supports, providing stability and visibility of the products. The front-facing shelves are slightly angled for easy access and product visibility, with promotional signage at the top and on the shelf edges advertising a 'Buy 3 Get 1 Free' offer. The color palette is dominated by white and black for the frame, with vibrant, multicolored chip bags adding visual interest. The kiosk is open on the front and sides, allowing customers to approach and select products from multiple angles. There are no windows, doors, or enclosed spaces, and the roof is flat and integrated into the overall rectangular design.
description: A freestanding metal snack display kiosk with four angled shelves stocked with colorful chip bags and prominent promotional signage. The open-front design allows easy customer access to products.
description_view_0: Front view showing four shelves filled with assorted chip bags, promotional signage, and the open-access design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the angled arrangement of the chip bags.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the perforated metal back panel and the kiosk's structural frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled shelves and the colorful arrangement of chip bags.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and banner, placed at the top and on the front edges of shelves, with visible text: 'BUY 3 GET 1 FREE' and 'Which Flavor are you Feelin?'
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, integrated with the frame, made of metal with no overhangs or decorative elements.
